title: Effective Procedure
prompt: Define the method as finite, definite, symbolic, and mechanically executable.

title: Machine Model
prompt: Map tape, symbols, head, states, and transition rules.

title: Universal Machine
prompt: Explain how one machine simulates another from a symbolic description.

title: Limits of Automation
prompt: Use undecidability and the halting problem to bound automation claims.

title: AI Caution
prompt: Read the imitation game as behavioral framing, not a total theory of mind.
